description_long: This object consists of a visually striking, abstract arrangement of donut-like forms, with one prominent pink, swirled donut featuring a greenish stem or stick protruding from its center. The composition includes additional elements such as a conical, white and blue section with red marbling, and several orange, ribbon-like appendages that twist and extend outward. The donuts themselves have a glossy, slightly irregular surface, suggesting a sugary glaze, and the colors range from pink and yellow to orange and blue. The structure appears to be a whimsical, artistic representation rather than a realistic depiction of donuts, with exaggerated and surreal features. The overall form is elongated, with thin, stick-like extensions and a dynamic, almost sculptural quality. No packaging or branding is visible, and the object appears unwrapped and free-standing.
description: A surreal, colorful arrangement of donut-like forms with pink, yellow, and orange hues, featuring glossy surfaces and abstract extensions. The structure is whimsical and artistic, with no visible packaging or branding.
description_view_0: A pink, swirled donut with a green stem is prominent, accompanied by a white-blue conical section and orange, ribbon-like extensions.
description_view_1: The donut appears more vertical, with the orange appendages and conical section dominating the view, and the pink donut partially obscured.
description_view_2: The yellow side of the donut is visible, with the blue and white conical section and orange ribbons extending outward.
description_view_3: The yellow donut with a green stem is most visible, with the orange appendages wrapping around the back.
attribute_icing_type: colored sugar glaze with a glossy finish, primarily pink and yellow
attribute_placement_location: free-standing, not placed on any surface or in any container
